rationale: Review 2 catches the same map_one'/map_mul' fragility and additionally flags the instFiberMulAction one_smul/mul_smul proofs (line 89) that repeat the same definitional-equality pattern — a real, material finding confirmed in the diff. Review 1's suggested fixes (redirect to fiberHomeomorph_one/mul) are arguably circular since those lemmas depend on the monoid hom being already defined correctly, making Review 2's guidance more actionable.
